ddls:
CREATE TABLE "graphics_cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graphics card */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the graphics card */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the graphics card */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the graphics card */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the graphics card in stock */,
  "img_path" TEXT /* File path to the image of the graphics card */,
  "vram" INTEGER /* VRAM capacity of the graphics card in GB */,
  "vram_type" TEXT /* Type of VRAM (e.g., GDDR6, GDDR5) */,
  "power_draw" INTEGER /* Power draw of the graphics card in watts */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the graphics card in millimeters */,
  "memory_bus" TEXT /* Memory bus width of the graphics card (e.g., 128-bit, 256-bit) */,
  "memory_bandwidth" INTEGER /* Memory bandwidth of the graphics card in GB/s */,
  "cuda_cores" INTEGER /* Number of CUDA cores in the graphics card */,
  "boost_clock" INTEGER /* Boost clock speed of the graphics card in MHz */,
  "base_clock" INTEGER /* Base clock speed of the graphics card in MHz */,
  "directx_version" TEXT /* DirectX version supported by the graphics card */,
  "opengl_version" TEXT /* OpenGL version supported by the graphics card */,
  "vulkan_version" TEXT /* Vulkan version supported by the graphics card */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period of the graphics card in months */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the graphics card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graphics_cards_length FOREIGN KEY ("length") REFERENCES lengths ("value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graphics_cards_vram_type FOREIGN KEY ("vram_type") REFERENCES vram_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graphics_cards_power_draw FOREIGN KEY ("power_draw") REFERENCES power_draws ("draw_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graphics_cards_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Store A, Warehouse B) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., store, warehouse, office) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Storage capacity of the location in square feet */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_levels" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock record */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graphics card */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the graphics card at the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock level was last updated */,
  "threshold_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level threshold for reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_levels_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_levels_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES graphics_cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graphics card */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the order is placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the graphics card ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, received) */,
  "order_status_date" TEXT /* Date when the order status was last updated */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES graphics_cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graphics card */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sale occurred */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the graphics card sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES graphics_cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, warehouse staff, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the organization */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the user is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the system was accessed */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vram_types" (
  "vram_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VRAM type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the VRAM type (e.g., GDDR6, GDDR5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the VRAM type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vram_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_draws" (
  "power_draw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power draw */,
  "draw_value" INTEGER /* Value of the power draw in watts */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., watts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lengths" (
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each length */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the length in millimeters */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., mm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("length_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_vram_power_length" (
  "cvpl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graphics card */,
  "vram_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VRAM type */,
  "power_draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power draw */,
  "length_id" INTEGER /* ID of the length */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cvpl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_vram_power_length_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES graphics_cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_vram_power_length_power_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("power_draw_id") REFERENCES power_draws ("power_draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_vram_power_length_length_id FOREIGN KEY ("length_id") REFERENCES lengths ("length_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_vram_power_length_vram_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vram_type_id") REFERENCES vram_types ("vram_type_id")
)
